+    "title": "notary-project: Define experience for notation sign command",
+    "description": "Define experience for notation sign command. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current notary-project deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your notary-project version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n notary-project -l app.kubernetes.io/name=notary-project\nhelm list -n notary-project 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working notary-project installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review notary-project configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant notary-project configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n notary-project -l app.kubernetes.io/name=notary-project\nkubectl get configmap -n notary-project -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=notary-project\n```\nThings to consider\n* Should we use a default key or need the user to explicitly specify the key\n* Does signing automatically push signature to repo? Which repo? \n* How does one filter out private signatures from being automatically pushed to public"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Define experience for notation sign command",
+        "description": "These are the target commands, lifting the [prototype-2](https://github.com/notaryproject/notation/tree/prototype-2) efforts to the nearly RC state of the [artifacts-spec](https://github.com/oras-project/artifacts-spec/)\n\nNote: these commands don't work, **_yet_**. This is the target for what will work.\nPlease iterate any feedback here and we can incorporate into the work to support these commands.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n notary-project -l app.kubernetes.io/name=notary-project\nkubectl get events -n notary-project --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Define experience for notation sign command\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "These are the target commands, lifting the [prototype-2](https://github.com/notaryproject/notation/tree/prototype-2) efforts to the nearly RC state of the [artifacts-spec](https://github.com/oras-project/artifacts-spec/)\n\nNote: these commands don't work, **_yet_**. This is the target for what will work.",
